title: plantago major var. nana
intro: Plantago major var. nana, also known as dwarf plantain, is a small, compact variety of the common plantain plant that grows to a height of about 10-20 cm. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of dwarf plantain include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Dwarf plantain can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
